Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "APECRAZE-3000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ape Craze.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $3000 which: 1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $3020 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400 (the game checks for the value $14 at $0342 within the tape buffer as a simple copy protection) 2. Zeroes out $FB-$FE to ensure the in-game music starts when the game begins 3. Jumps to the entry point at $0810 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code)
